name: Creamed Peas and Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the new potatoes until tender.
2. Boil the frozen peas until tender.
3. Drain both the potatoes and peas.
4. Pour white sauce over the potatoes and peas.
5. Stir until well mixed.
White sauce:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Blend in flour, salt, and 1/4 teaspoon of white pepper.
3. Add milk all at once to the saucepan.
4. Cook quickly, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and bubbles.
5. Remove the sauce from the heat when it bubbles.
